sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111180" key="filoqre/mmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-θρέμμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n111180.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of rearing animals,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:7:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
